description:
AI-powered next-generation cross-platform multithreaded downloader.

A cross-platform fluent-design AI-boost multi-threaded downloader built with Python.
Important
我们建议通过软件内的 设置 > 浏览器扩展 > 一键安装 的方式来更新最新的浏览器插件 (#390)
Caution
从 v3.x 更新至此版本后会丢失原有任务列表和部分设置项，降级后可以恢复
新增功能 🎉
- Android 版新增 YouTube 视频下载支持 By @XiaoYouChR
- GD4B 浏览器扩展升级至 2.0.4，下载按钮支持拖拽移位和关闭 By @XiaoYouChR
功能优化 🔧
- YouTube 视频下载一键安装所需下载的依赖大小从 100MB 降至 5MB By @XiaoYouChR
- 优化 Bilibili 剪贴板嗅探，仅匹配视频链接，避免复制首页等非视频链接时误弹下载窗口 (#555) By @XiaoYouChR
问题修复 🐛
- 修复编辑任务参数时报错的问题 (#561) By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 macOS 滚动条样式异常的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复手动导入 Bilibili Cookie 后不拉取账号信息的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 Windows 10 托盘菜单有概率超出屏幕的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复下载任务出错时错误信息无法正常显示的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复 Windows 上使用 Administrator 账户时 HTTP 下载不可用的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
- 修复设置中的界面缩放比例不生效的问题 By @XiaoYouChR
Important
We recommend updating the latest browser extension via Settings > Browser Extension > One-Click Install within the app (#390)
Caution
Upgrading from v3.x to this version will lose existing task list and some settings. Downgrading can restore them.
New Features 🎉
- Added YouTube video download support for the Android version By @XiaoYouChR
- The GD4B browser extension has been upgraded to 2.0.4 — the download button now supports dragging to reposition and dismissing By @XiaoYouChR
Improvements 🔧
- Reduced YouTube video download one-click install dependency size from 100MB to 5MB By @XiaoYouChR
- Improved Bilibili clipboard detection to only match video links, preventing false download prompts when copying non-video URLs like the homepage (#555) By @XiaoYouChR
Bug Fixes 🐛
- Fixed an error when editing task parameters (#561) By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed abnormal scrollbar styling on macOS By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed account info not being fetched after manually importing Bilibili cookies By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed the Windows 10 tray menu occasionally extending beyond the screen edge By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed error messages not displaying correctly when a download task fails By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed HTTP downloads being unavailable when running under the Windows Administrator account By @XiaoYouChR
- Fixed the UI scaling setting not taking effect By @XiaoYouChR
Full Changelog: v4.0.4...v4.0.5
